zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple於1422年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特洛吉爾福黑阿德時，她的父親William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair22歲，母親Agnes Kennedy28歲。她於1438年與Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1443年在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾享年21歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾登斯可雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple于1422年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特洛吉爾福黑阿德时，她的父亲William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair22岁，母亲Agnes Kennedy28岁。她于1438年与Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1443年在英国苏格兰度福利爾享年21岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利爾登斯可雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dalrymple
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Ayrshire, named with Gaelic dail ‘field, meadow’ + an unexplained second element.
History: The Dalrymple family which held the earldom of Stair can be traced to William de Dalrymple, who in 1429 acquired the estate of Stair in Kyle, Ayrshire.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple was born in 1422, in Lochgilphead, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair, was 22 and her mother, Agnes Kennedy, was 28. She married Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) in 1438, in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1443, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 21, and was buried in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple est née en 1422, à Lochgilphead, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes Kennedy, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) en 1438, à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1443, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Lochgilphead, Argyll and Bute, Scotland,: Lochgilphead, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple 1422 in Lochgilphead, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair 22 und ihre Mutter Agnes Kennedy 28. Sie hat 1438 in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1443 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrympleが1422年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトロチジルフエアドで生まれた時，父William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stairは22歳，母Agnes Kennedyは28歳であった。1438年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズでVedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1443年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで21歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダンスコアにて埋葬された。

ko.Lochgilphead, Argyll and Bute, Scotland,: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 럭길프이드
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple(이)가 1422년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 럭길프이드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Kennedy(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1438년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에서 Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 던스코어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple nasceu em 1422, em Lochgilphead, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Kennedy, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) em 1438, em Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1443, em Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 21 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Lochgilphead, Argyll and Bute, Scotland,: лочгилфид, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Glendonwyn de Dalrymple родилась в 1422 г. в местности лочгилфид, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William De Dalrymple, 1st Baron Dalrymple of Stair было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Kennedy, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) в 1438 г. в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1443 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год и была похоронена в местности дунскор, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Vedast GRIERSON (3rd Feudal Lord of Lag) en 1438, en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1443, en Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años, y fue sepultada en Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
